text: Which one of the listed requirements regarding rigid life rafts does NOT correspond to present regulations?

options.text: It shall be fitted with an efficient painter
The floor shall prevent the ingress of water
All the entrances must be fitted with rigid boarding ramps for boarding life rafts at sea

explanation: While life rafts are equipped with boarding ladders or means to assist access, rigid boarding ramps are not a universal requirement for all life rafts, making option C the incorrect regulatory statement.
